when click logout button, the application redirect to http://localhost:3000/ and not to sign-in page and the application stop

when i sign-in the page reload many times and I get the following message in consol:
The <SignIn/> component cannot render when a user is already signed in, unless the application allows multiple sessions. Since a user is signed in and this application only allows a single session, Clerk is redirecting to the `afterSignIn` URL instead.
(This notice only appears in development)

after sign-in the application go to blank page the URL is :https://resolved-heron-56.clerk.accounts.dev/v1/oauth_callback?_set_cookie_client_id=client_3GSfEM2SVazYCtguSNtibqQlxup&_set_cookie_subdomain=clerk&ret_obj_type=redirect&_csrf_token=mUQgRKOGdZUMMs7MSiU0smEdubs5hOSL&_final_redirect_url=http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A3000%2F%3F__clerk_handshake%3DeyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImNhdCI6ImNsX0I3ZDRQRDExMUFBQSIsImtpZCI6Imluc18zR1NadUhWM0hPQnFtNVdTZjNMNHZ1R2JKd2giLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QifQ..QvDYWwtox824bkw00VjS_Jq0WELgbDKLy6V349vLgZOucKE2daVQrwv0rssrzk6ZbYtKnue5G6n2lWtqulSqOjLphQ542nFiwcImXKlgg0tXDiz2u8CxzvXIs4H6hb3sL5l3gDflKC45aIHFCskFlzI72oYrLtEZQoeTcMfuZyi4hW_l_eh3Hg2u1A6hdWjovRuTxe2tbmXCoi-sN3TI29cEHOKE0KMhvFt9y7orsbGmWO1rXZ7XvuHtIuc68G74Lhxn-Ym9R8XaPlgTZ_ZjyWT9x0FuGG2-Mml-rTlr1oyfDUOgOtCcPAqn4TSSxFRpdBtUoqwEVZ1pTIvc6Q1Tmw
